title: Fix dnf/yum conditions build_rpm
body:
Previous implementation did not work as expected because adding
quotes disabled the expansion in bash and the matches were never true.

Signed-off-by: Sorin Sbarnea <ssbarnea@redhat.com>

comments.body: LGTM and happy green test buttons.
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably #4601) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.

@ssbarnea: PR needs rebase.
